data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of safely re-driving dead-letter events. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete details or endpoints that demonstrate how dead-letter events are handled or re-driven. The linked use case mentions the ops team replaying events after fixing credentials, but it lacks specific information on the safety mechanisms or processes involved in this re-driving, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the mechanisms or processes for safely re-driving dead-letter events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define dead-letter event re-drive process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and safety measures for re-driving dead-letter events.
